description: Torn fragments from a court record regarding a dispute over an inheritance of 31 dinars from a brother named Ḥasūn, between Ḥasūna and her cousin (ibn ʿamm) Manṣūr b. Efrayim. Ḥasūna went to the Muslim court regarding this claim. There are pen trials in Hebrew and Arabic on verso, with strange-looking letters. Join: Oded Zinger. AA/ASE
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
